cpi.source: RBA Statement on Monetary Policy, Feb 2026

wageGrowth.source: ABS Wage Price Index, Dec 2025 quarter

interestRates.source: RBA cash rate target, major-bank standard variable averages

assetReturns.bitcoinVolatilityNote: Keel does not assume any specific BTC return trajectory. Use the user's current holding value for short-term answers; flag uncertainty explicitly for any long-horizon answer involving crypto.
assetReturns.source: ASX 200 accumulation index, 1986-2025 annualised; RBA household deposit averages

propertyAssumptions.propertyGrowthNote: Significant regional and segment variation. Do not project individual property values beyond two years without explicit user-supplied data.
propertyAssumptions.source: CoreLogic Home Value Index, national dwelling series 2015-2025
